EmailTemplate.name: Runwal Gardens Payment Reconciliation
EmailTemplate.subject: Runwal Gardens – Payment Reconciliation
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!Booking__c.Primary_Applicant_Name__c},
Greetings from Runwal Gardens!!
We are happy to inform you that your Flat at Runwal Gardens is in final stage of completion, and we will be initiating the possession formalities towards your Dream Home very soon.
As a precursor to possessions, we are starting with the reconciliation of your accounts.
We hereby request you to provide us your details of payment made towards your flat till date.
This includes the following:
1 Bank Statements of payments made to Runwal (Highlighted) 2 TDS Certificates 3 Online Payments detail (NEFT / RTGS / IMPS) 4 Loan Statement of payments made to Runwal through Bank Loan
Request you to kindly share same on or before 15th March 2023 for us to initiation the reconciliation process.
Either you can reply on this email or kindly email us on "possessionreconciliation@runwal.com".
Please ignore this email if statements / proofs have been already shared.
Warm Regards, Runwal Gardens Possessions Team
